title: Identify, select and specify trees
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify, select and specify trees demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine tree selection criteria

pcs.text: Develop tree selection brief in consultation with client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop tree selection brief in consultation with client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop tree selection brief in consultation with client.

pcs.text: Undertake site inspection to identify site conditions and constraints
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake site inspection to identify site conditions and constraints?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake site inspection to identify site conditions and constraints.

pcs.text: Identify tree selection limitations according to legislative, regulatory and Australian standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify tree selection limitations according to legislative, regulatory and Australian standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify tree selection limitations according to legislative, regulatory and Australian standards.

pcs.text: Determine functional life expectancy of site and planting
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine functional life expectancy of site and planting?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine functional life expectancy of site and planting.

pcs.text: Assess tree characteristics suitable for the site conditions and constraints according to client brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess tree characteristics suitable for the site conditions and constraints according to client brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess tree characteristics suitable for the site conditions and constraints according to client brief.

pcs.text: Assess and confirm the suitability of trees as a valid option for site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and confirm the suitability of trees as a valid option for site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and confirm the suitability of trees as a valid option for site.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine tree selection criteria

elements.title: Identify and select trees

pcs.text: Determine dimensions of site for planting according to client brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine dimensions of site for planting according to client brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine dimensions of site for planting according to client brief.

pcs.text: Estimate available root zone profile of site for planting
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate available root zone profile of site for planting?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate available root zone profile of site for planting.

pcs.text: Assess and verify root zone profile is proportional to proposed tree size according to client brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and verify root zone profile is proportional to proposed tree size according to client brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and verify root zone profile is proportional to proposed tree size according to client brief.

pcs.text: Assess environmental and hydrological conditions and consider impact on tree selection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess environmental and hydrological conditions and consider impact on tree selection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess environmental and hydrological conditions and consider impact on tree selection.

pcs.text: Test and assess root zone profile physical and chemical properties to assist tree selection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test and assess root zone profile physical and chemical properties to assist tree selection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test and assess root zone profile physical and chemical properties to assist tree selection.

pcs.text: Recommend soil/media amendments for planting site according to test result outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recommend soil/media amendments for planting site according to test result outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recommend soil/media amendments for planting site according to test result outcomes.

pcs.text: Identify and evaluate performance of trees common in local region for suitability of selection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and evaluate performance of trees common in local region for suitability of selection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and evaluate performance of trees common in local region for suitability of selection.

pcs.text: Use reference materials to identify and select trees with characteristics conforming to site conditions, selection criteria and client brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use reference materials to identify and select trees with characteristics conforming to site conditions, selection criteria and client brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use reference materials to identify and select trees with characteristics conforming to site conditions, selection criteria and client brief.

pcs.text: Compile and update a database of tree selections and characteristics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compile and update a database of tree selections and characteristics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compile and update a database of tree selections and characteristics.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify and select trees

elements.title: Specify trees

pcs.text: Research and select availability, type and size of tree stock for selected trees
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and select availability, type and size of tree stock for selected trees?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and select availability, type and size of tree stock for selected trees.

pcs.text: Select size and type of tree stock according to tree production characteristics and Australian quality standards for tree stock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select size and type of tree stock according to tree production characteristics and Australian quality standards for tree stock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select size and type of tree stock according to tree production characteristics and Australian quality standards for tree stock.

pcs.text: Verify tree selection against selection criteria, size and quantities with client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify tree selection against selection criteria, size and quantities with client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify tree selection against selection criteria, size and quantities with client.

pcs.text: Determine planting method and specification appropriate to the species and the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine planting method and specification appropriate to the species and the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine planting method and specification appropriate to the species and the site.

pcs.text: Document specifications for selected trees according to industry and Australian standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document specifications for selected trees according to industry and Australian standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document specifications for selected trees according to industry and Australian standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Specify trees

elements.title: Verify quality of tree and materials on delivery

pcs.text: Inspect selected plants on site for quality and quantities according to specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect selected plants on site for quality and quantities according to specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect selected plants on site for quality and quantities according to specifications.

pcs.text: Inspect delivered materials for root zone profile for quality and quantity according to specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect delivered materials for root zone profile for quality and quantity according to specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect delivered materials for root zone profile for quality and quantity according to specifications.

pcs.text: Record quality check results according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record quality check results according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record quality check results according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Verify quality of tree and materials on delivery

elements.title: Correlate and present a report

pcs.text: Produce a report of the identification, selection and specification process, and incorporate correlated records according to industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Produce a report of the identification, selection and specification process, and incorporate correlated records according to industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Produce a report of the identification, selection and specification process, and incorporate correlated records according to industry standards.

pcs.text: Present client or organisation with report

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present client or organisation with report.
